APPEARANCES: MICHAEL J. HICKS, PRO PER (NO PHONE NUMBER) APPEARING BY TELEPHONE. LISA M. SITKIN, ESQUIRE (LAW OFFICES OF AMITAI SCHWARTZ, 510.597.1775) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT.
RULING: COURT CONTINUES THE MATTER TO SEPTEMBER 12, 2007. MS. SITKIN IS TO PROVIDE MR. HICKS WITH COPIES OF THE CASES, APPLICABLE STATUTES, INCLUDING ANNOTATED CODE SECTIONS CITED IN THE MOVING PAPERS. ADDITIONALLY MS. SITKIN IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE MR. HICKS WITH THE APPROPRIATE PAGES RELATING TO SHEPARDIZING THE CASE. COURT ORDERS THE AUTHORITIES TO RESPOND TO MR. HICKS' REQUESTS FOR FURTHER LEGAL AUTHORITIES AS IT RELATES TO THIS ISSUE. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: LAURA MARTINEZ, CSR 11332
